faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about FitCoach AI.

items.question: How does AI generation work?
items.answer: FitCoach AI uses GPT-4 to generate workout programs, nutrition plans and content based on the information you provide. Each generation is unique and personalized.

items.question: Can I edit generated programs?
items.answer: Yes, you can edit all generated programs directly in the app. AI provides a working base that you can refine to your needs.

items.question: How does client sharing work?
items.answer: You generate a secure link from your dashboard. Your client can access their program without creating an account, with your branding displayed.

items.question: Can I cancel at any time?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You keep access until the end of your billing period.

items.question: Is my client data secure?
items.answer: Yes. All data is encrypted and stored securely. We never share your client data with third parties.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: The free plan gives you access to 3 generations per month with no time limit. You can upgrade whenever you want.
